TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KavNr-pear_Haciang
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: yau paknanem baqian zinna.
S.PHON: jau paknanəm βaqian z~rinna.
S.FORM: yau paknanem baqian zinna.
S.PHON: jau paknanəm βaqian z~rinna.

S.FORM: pak palumaan tu izau tu qaqanan tu zau tu.
S.PHON: pak parumaan tu iz~rau tu qaqanan tu z~rau tu.
S.FORM: pak palumaan tu izau tu qaqanan tu zau tu.
S.PHON: pak parumaan tu iz~rau tu qaqanan tu z~rau tu.

TRANSL.notes: (He) planted many things (fruits) to eat.

S.FORM: byabas zinna timangu teqaSti ya penalumaanna tu zau tu byabas zinna nani.
S.PHON: βjaβas z~rinna timaŋu təqasti ja pənarumaanna tu z~rau tu βjaβas z~rinna nani.
S.FORM: byabas zinna timangu teqaSti ya penalumaanna tu zau tu byabas zinna nani.
S.PHON: βjaβas z~rinna timaŋu təqasti ja pənarumaanna tu z~rau tu βjaβas z~rinna nani.
S.TRANSL: 他種的芭樂已經成熟了.
The guavas he planted have ripened.

S.FORM: haw nayau usiq qyalakita ka zinna baqian 'nay.
S.PHON: haw najau usiq qjarakita ka z~rinna βaqian ʔnaj.
S.FORM: haw nayau usiq qyalakita ka zinna baqian 'nay.
S.PHON: haw najau usiq qjarakita ka z~rinna βaqian ʔnaj.

TRANSL.notes: Okay, then let's go to pick (the guavas).

S.TRANSL: Okay, then let's go to pick .

S.FORM: tu wiyati.
S.PHON: tu wijati.
S.FORM: tu wiyati.
S.PHON: tu wijati.

TRANSL.notes: (老人)就去了.
(He) started off.

S.FORM: mazas tu qanas.
S.PHON: maz~ras tu qanas.
S.FORM: mazas tu qanas.
S.PHON: maz~ras tu qanas.

TRANSL.notes: (He) carried a basket.

S.FORM: zau a izau zaqisan tu wiyati zaqisannati a byabasay yau qmyala' nani.
S.PHON: z~rau a iz~rau z~raqisan tu wijati z~raqisannati a βjaβasaj jau qmjaraʔ nani.
S.FORM: zau a izau zaqisan tu wiyati zaqisannati a byabasay yau qmyala' nani.
S.PHON: z~rau a iz~rau z~raqisan tu wijati z~raqisannati a βjaβasaj jau qmjaraʔ nani.

TRANSL.notes: 就去爬上了芭樂樹,採(芭樂).
He went climbing on the guava tree to pick (guavas).

S.TRANSL: He went climbing on the guava tree to pick .

S.FORM: uzusati ya qawas ya qenyalaanna na.
S.PHON: uz~rusati ja qawas ja qənjaraanna na.
S.FORM: uzusati ya qawas ya qenyalaanna na.
S.PHON: uz~rusati ja qawas ja qənjaraanna na.

TRANSL.notes: He picked two baskets (of guavas).

S.FORM: yau a lazat a yau qmawkawiq tu sizi.
S.PHON: jau a raz~rat a jau qmawkawiq tu siz~ri.
S.FORM: yau a lazat a yau qmawkawiq tu sizi.
S.PHON: jau a raz~rat a jau qmawkawiq tu siz~ri.
S.TRANSL: 有一個人牽著羊走來走去.
There was one man pulling a goat.

S.FORM: temala mlaziw tataanna taytaanna na ma qmyala haw tu byabas zinna na.
S.PHON: təmara mraz~riw tataanna tajtaanna na ma qmjara haw tu βjaβas z~rinna na.
S.FORM: temala mlaziw tataanna taytaanna na ma qmyala haw tu byabas zinna na.
S.PHON: təmara mraz~riw tataanna tajtaanna na ma qmjara haw tu βjaβas z~rinna na.
S.TRANSL: 經過,看到那個採芭樂的.

TRANSL.notes: (He) passed by and saw the one picking guavas.

S.TRANSL: passed by and saw the one picking guavas.

S.FORM: wiyati ya lazat a yau a qmawitay tu sizina.
S.PHON: wijati ja raz~rat a jau a qmawitaj tu siz~rina.
S.FORM: wiyati ya lazat a yau a qmawitay tu sizina.
S.PHON: wijati ja raz~rat a jau a qmawitaj tu siz~rina.
S.TRANSL: The person who pulled the goat left.

S.FORM: timengna yauti ya sunis a yau a mala mqa qitun mawtu.
S.PHON: timəŋna jauti ja sunis a jau a mara mqa qitun mawtu.
S.FORM: timengna yauti ya sunis a yau a mala mqa qitun mawtu.
S.PHON: timəŋna jauti ja sunis a jau a mara mqa qitun mawtu.
S.TRANSL: 有一個小孩騎著腳踏車來.
There was a child who rode a bicycle coming along.

S.FORM: mlasiw ta baqian 'nay yau tu qmyala tu byabas 'nay.
S.PHON: mrasiw ta βaqian ʔnaj jau tu qmjara tu βjaβas ʔnaj.
S.FORM: mlasiw ta baqian 'nay yau tu qmyala tu byabas 'nay.
S.PHON: mrasiw ta βaqian ʔnaj jau tu qmjara tu βjaβas ʔnaj.

TRANSL.notes: (他)經過那個在採芭樂的老人那邊.

S.TRANSL: 經過那個在採芭樂的老人那邊.

TRANSL.notes: (He) went past where the old was picking guavas.

S.TRANSL: went past where the old was picking guavas.

S.FORM: titaanna nani.
S.PHON: titaanna nani.
S.FORM: titaanna nani.
S.PHON: titaanna nani.

S.FORM: aw mana qanengi qanan qa zau a byabas a zau zinna sayza nani.
S.PHON: aw mana qanəŋi qanan qa z~rau a βjaβas a z~rau z~rinna sajz~ra nani.
S.FORM: aw mana qanengi qanan qa zau a byabas a zau zinna sayza nani.
S.PHON: aw mana qanəŋi qanan qa z~rau a βjaβas a z~rau z~rinna sajz~ra nani.

TRANSL.notes: Oh. It seems that guavas are good to eat (taste good).

S.TRANSL: Oh. It seems that guavas are good to eat .

S.FORM: ngidanna ala tu usiq na.
S.PHON: ŋiɮanna ara tu usiq na.
S.FORM: ngidanna ala tu usiq na.
S.PHON: ŋiɮanna ara tu usiq na.

S.FORM: mengaRiw qaseminta zinna na.
S.PHON: məŋaʁiw qasəminta z~rinna na.
S.FORM: mengaRiw qaseminta zinna na.
S.PHON: məŋaʁiw qasəminta z~rinna na.

TRANSL.notes: He wondered whether it would be enough (for us).

S.TRANSL: He wondered whether it would be enough .

S.FORM: madikud uman taytaanna yau zau saqanas.
S.PHON: maɮikuɮ uman tajtaanna jau z~rau saqanas.
S.FORM: madikud uman taytaanna yau zau saqanas.
S.PHON: maɮikuɮ uman tajtaanna jau z~rau saqanas.
S.TRANSL: He turned back again and saw there was a basket.

S.FORM: wisisannati na pizyaanna tangayawan na qitunna.
S.PHON: wisisannati na piz~rjaanna taŋajawan na qitunna.
S.FORM: wisisannati na pizyaanna tangayawan na qitunna.
S.PHON: wisisannati na piz~rjaanna taŋajawan na qitunna.
S.TRANSL: 拿起來放在車子的前面.
He lifted it up and put it in front of his vehicle.

S.FORM: tu zau tu.
S.PHON: tu z~rau tu.
S.FORM: tu zau tu.
S.PHON: tu z~rau tu.

S.FORM: izau zitinsya zinna zipung tu zau a qitunna zau.
S.PHON: iz~rau z~ritinsja z~rinna z~ripuŋ tu z~rau a qitunna z~rau.
S.FORM: izau zitinsya zinna zipung tu zau a qitunna zau.
S.PHON: iz~rau z~ritinsja z~rinna z~ripuŋ tu z~rau a qitunna z~rau.
S.TRANSL: 這部車就是日本所稱的自行車.
This is the vehicle called 'bicycle' in Japanese.

S.FORM: piziannati tangayawanna tu wiyati mRaRiw.
S.PHON: piz~riannati taŋajawanna tu wijati mʁaʁiw.
S.FORM: piziannati tangayawanna tu wiyati mRaRiw.
S.PHON: piz~riannati taŋajawanna tu wijati mʁaʁiw.
S.TRANSL: 放在車前面之後,走了唷.

TRANSL.notes: After he put (it) on his bike, he left.

S.TRANSL: After he put on his bike, he left.

S.FORM: Raynguanna baqian 'nay yau a mzaqis sababaw a qmyala ta byabasay yau nani.
S.PHON: ʁajŋuanna βaqian ʔnaj jau a mz~raqis saβaβaw a qmjara ta βjaβasaj jau nani.
S.FORM: Raynguanna baqian 'nay yau a mzaqis sababaw a qmyala ta byabasay yau nani.
S.PHON: ʁajŋuanna βaqian ʔnaj jau a mz~raqis saβaβaw a qmjara ta βjaβasaj jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 那個爬在樹上採芭樂的老人家根本不知道.

TRANSL.notes: (The old man) who was picking guavas (up on the tree) did not know it.

S.TRANSL: who was picking guavas did not know it.

S.FORM: syazi tabatasan na lazan nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taβatasan na raz~ran nani.
S.FORM: syazi tabatasan na lazan nani.
S.PHON: sjaz~ri taβatasan na raz~ran nani.

TRANSL.notes: (When he) arrived halfway on the road.

S.FORM: yau a paknanem tazungan sunis.
S.PHON: jau a paknanəm taz~ruŋan sunis.
S.FORM: yau a paknanem tazungan sunis.
S.PHON: jau a paknanəm taz~ruŋan sunis.

S.FORM: simqatapung qaniyau mqa qitun nani.
S.PHON: simqatapuŋ qanijau mqa qitun nani.
S.FORM: simqatapung qaniyau mqa qitun nani.
S.PHON: simqatapuŋ qanijau mqa qitun nani.
S.TRANSL: They met each other, both riding bicycles.

S.FORM: tmayta ta qubuna ta simqena sayza. XXXX
S.PHON: tmajta ta quβuna ta simqəna sajz~ra. ****
S.FORM: tmayta ta qubuna ta simqena sayza. XXXX
S.PHON: tmajta ta quβuna ta simqəna sajz~ra. ****
S.TRANSL: 女孩看到帽子覺得很漂亮.

TRANSL.notes: (The girl) saw his hat, thinking it was good-looking.

S.TRANSL: saw his hat, thinking it was good-looking.

TRANSL.notes: 好看(非人)

S.FORM: bitisanna ya qubu yau tu msuRawti ya sunis a yau a.
S.PHON: βitisanna ja quβu jau tu msuʁawti ja sunis a jau a.
S.FORM: bitisanna ya qubu yau tu msuRawti ya sunis a yau a.
S.PHON: βitisanna ja quβu jau tu msuʁawti ja sunis a jau a.
S.TRANSL: 她搶他的帽子,小孩子跌倒了.
She robbed him of his hat, and the child fell.

S.FORM: m mya mRuziqay tu byabas nani.
S.PHON: m mja mʁuz~riqaj tu βjaβas nani.
S.FORM: m mya mRuziqay tu byabas nani.
S.PHON: m mja mʁuz~riqaj tu βjaβas nani.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩子就是偷芭樂的.

TRANSL.notes: (The child is the one) who stole the guavas.

S.FORM: bibyakti ya byabas a yau sa qawas.
S.PHON: βiβjakti ja βjaβas a jau sa qawas.
S.FORM: bibyakti ya byabas a yau sa qawas.
S.PHON: βiβjakti ja βjaβas a jau sa qawas.

S.FORM: na timengna yau izau kaputna.
S.PHON: na timəŋna jau iz~rau kaputna.
S.FORM: na timengna yau izau kaputna.
S.PHON: na timəŋna jau iz~rau kaputna.

TRANSL.notes: Fortunately, (he) had friends.

S.FORM: nayau mawRawRat tayan ta butuqbutuqan sayza nani.
S.PHON: najau mawʁawʁat tajan ta βutuqβutuqan sajz~ra nani.
S.FORM: nayau mawRawRat tayan ta butuqbutuqan sayza nani.
S.PHON: najau mawʁawʁat tajan ta βutuqβutuqan sajz~ra nani.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)好像在池塘玩耍的樣子.

S.TRANSL: 好像在池塘玩耍的樣子.

TRANSL.notes: (They) seemed to be playing at the pond.

S.TRANSL: seemed to be playing at the pond.

S.FORM: yauti mawtu mangmu taytaanna yauti m msuRaw aizipna nani.
S.PHON: jauti mawtu maŋmu tajtaanna jauti m msuʁaw aiz~ripna nani.
S.FORM: yauti mawtu mangmu taytaanna yauti m msuRaw aizipna nani.
S.PHON: jauti mawtu maŋmu tajtaanna jauti m msuʁaw aiz~ripna nani.
S.TRANSL: 看到他跌倒有來幫忙他.
Seeing him fall, they came to help him.

S.FORM: musipusti ta zapanna ta mluzitti sayza nayau mzuquq ta betuan nani.
S.PHON: musipusti ta z~rapanna ta mruz~ritti sajz~ra najau mz~ruquq ta βətuan nani.
S.FORM: musipusti ta zapanna ta mluzitti sayza nayau mzuquq ta betuan nani.
S.PHON: musipusti ta z~rapanna ta mruz~ritti sajz~ra najau mz~ruquq ta βətuan nani.
S.TRANSL: 他揉他的腳,好像受傷的樣子,撞到石頭.

TRANSL.notes: He rubbed his leg; maybe he got hurt. (He) stumbled over a stone.

S.TRANSL: He rubbed his leg; maybe he got hurt. stumbled over a stone.

S.FORM: yauti pangmuan na kaputna.
S.PHON: jauti paŋmuan na kaputna.
S.FORM: yauti pangmuan na kaputna.
S.PHON: jauti paŋmuan na kaputna.

S.FORM: ya mazmun na kaputna ya izau.
S.PHON: ja maz~rmun na kaputna ja iz~rau.
S.FORM: ya mazmun na kaputna ya izau.
S.PHON: ja maz~rmun na kaputna ja iz~rau.

S.FORM: mangmuay ta ta sepez taqaqanasan nani.
S.PHON: maŋmuaj ta ta səpəz~r taqaqanasan nani.
S.FORM: mangmuay ta ta sepez taqaqanasan nani.
S.PHON: maŋmuaj ta ta səpəz~r taqaqanasan nani.

TRANSL.notes: Helping put (them) in the basket.

S.FORM: tu alaannati pizi taqitunan uman ngid qawi nani.
S.PHON: tu araannati piz~ri taqitunan uman ŋiɮ qawi nani.
S.FORM: tu alaannati pizi taqitunan uman ngid qawi nani.
S.PHON: tu araannati piz~ri taqitunan uman ŋiɮ qawi nani.
S.TRANSL: 拿了水果又再放回去車上.

TRANSL.notes: (He) took (the fruits) and put (them) on the bicycle again.

S.TRANSL: took and put on the bicycle again.

S.FORM: timengna qawiyatiiku zinna sayza.
S.PHON: timəŋna qawijatiiku z~rinna sajz~ra.
S.FORM: timengna qawiyatiiku zinna sayza.
S.PHON: timəŋna qawijatiiku z~rinna sajz~ra.

S.FORM: wiyati ya kaputna qaya ngid sasaqay pasazui tabutuqan.
S.PHON: wijati ja kaputna qaja ŋiɮ sasaqaj pasaz~rui taβutuqan.
S.FORM: wiyati ya kaputna qaya ngid sasaqay pasazui tabutuqan.
S.PHON: wijati ja kaputna qaja ŋiɮ sasaqaj pasaz~rui taβutuqan.
S.TRANSL: 他的朋友也走去湖邊玩了.
His friends also left for the pond to play there.

S.FORM: taytaanna yau qubu 'nay nialaanna 'nay na tazungan a yau 'nay nani.
S.PHON: tajtaanna jau quβu ʔnaj niaraanna ʔnaj na taz~ruŋan a jau ʔnaj nani.
S.FORM: taytaanna yau qubu 'nay nialaanna 'nay na tazungan a yau 'nay nani.
S.PHON: tajtaanna jau quβu ʔnaj niaraanna ʔnaj na taz~ruŋan a jau ʔnaj nani.
S.TRANSL: 他看到被女孩子搶的帽子還在.
He saw that the hat taken away by the girl was still there.

S.FORM: niuniusannati tu.
S.PHON: niuniusannati tu.
S.FORM: niuniusannati tu.
S.PHON: niuniusannati tu.

TRANSL.notes: He (could only) keep whistling.

W.TRANSL: 重疊-吹口哨-處焦-3SG.屬格=完成

S.FORM: m Renin nani yau qubusu zinna na kaputna nani.
S.PHON: m ʁənin nani jau quβusu z~rinna na kaputna nani.
S.FORM: m Renin nani yau qubusu zinna na kaputna nani.
S.PHON: m ʁənin nani jau quβusu z~rinna na kaputna nani.
S.TRANSL: 他回頭,他的朋友說,'這邊有你的帽子'.
He turned back; his friends said, 'Here is your hat.'

S.FORM: wiyati tmadikud.
S.PHON: wijati tmaɮikuɮ.
S.FORM: wiyati tmadikud.
S.PHON: wijati tmaɮikuɮ.

S.FORM: timengna qatiwita si.
S.PHON: timəŋna qatiwita si.
S.FORM: timengna qatiwita si.
S.PHON: timəŋna qatiwita si.

S.FORM: bulakita tu byabas zinna tu.
S.PHON: βurakita tu βjaβas z~rinna tu.
S.FORM: bulakita tu byabas zinna tu.
S.PHON: βurakita tu βjaβas z~rinna tu.

TRANSL.notes: He said, 'I will give guavas (to…).'

S.FORM: sinusiqanna ya kaputna tu byabas a yau tu.
S.PHON: sinusiqanna ja kaputna tu βjaβas a jau tu.
S.FORM: sinusiqanna ya kaputna tu byabas a yau tu.
S.PHON: sinusiqanna ja kaputna tu βjaβas a jau tu.
S.TRANSL: 他分給他的朋友一人一個芭樂.
He gave each friend a guava.

S.FORM: wiyati aizipna tangi nani.
S.PHON: wijati aiz~ripna taŋi nani.
S.FORM: wiyati aizipna tangi nani.
S.PHON: wijati aiz~ripna taŋi nani.
S.TRANSL: Now he was about to leave.

S.FORM: tmadikudti ya kaputna nani.
S.PHON: tmaɮikuɮti ja kaputna nani.
S.FORM: tmadikudti ya kaputna nani.
S.PHON: tmaɮikuɮti ja kaputna nani.

S.FORM: niz qman tu byabasna.
S.PHON: niz~r qman tu βjaβasna.
S.FORM: niz qman tu byabasna.
S.PHON: niz~r qman tu βjaβasna.

S.FORM: taytaanna baqian a yau maiti ya usiq qaqawasay a yau a byabas 'nay.
S.PHON: tajtaanna βaqian a jau maiti ja usiq qaqawasaj a jau a βjaβas ʔnaj.
S.FORM: taytaanna baqian a yau maiti ya usiq qaqawasay a yau a byabas 'nay.
S.PHON: tajtaanna βaqian a jau maiti ja usiq qaqawasaj a jau a βjaβas ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: 老人看到有一籃芭樂不見了.
The old man saw that one basket of guavas disappeared.

S.FORM: wa qanizau haw mRuziqay ta byabasku zinnati.
S.PHON: wa qaniz~rau haw mʁuz~riqaj ta βjaβasku z~rinnati.
S.FORM: wa qanizau haw mRuziqay ta byabasku zinnati.
S.PHON: wa qaniz~rau haw mʁuz~riqaj ta βjaβasku z~rinnati.
S.TRANSL: 他想可能是這些小孩子偷我的芭樂.

TRANSL.notes: 'Those (children) might have stolen my guavas,' thought the old man.

S.TRANSL: 'Those might have stolen my guavas,' thought the old man.

S.FORM: sayza pamenganna pasisitaRanna baqian a yau a kaput na sunis a yau a izau zau a mRuziqay tu byabas a yau nani.
S.PHON: sajz~ra paməŋanna pasisitaʁanna βaqian a jau a kaput na sunis a jau a iz~rau z~rau a mʁuz~riqaj tu βjaβas a jau nani.
S.FORM: sayza pamenganna pasisitaRanna baqian a yau a kaput na sunis a yau a izau zau a mRuziqay tu byabas a yau nani.
S.PHON: sajz~ra paməŋanna pasisitaʁanna βaqian a jau a kaput na sunis a jau a iz~rau z~rau a mʁuz~riqaj tu βjaβas a jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 他只能瞪著那些偷了芭樂的小孩.
The old man could only stare at the children who had stolen the guavas.

S.FORM: pameng tmayta baqian a yau tu.
S.PHON: paməŋ tmajta βaqian a jau tu.
S.FORM: pameng tmayta baqian a yau tu.
S.PHON: paməŋ tmajta βaqian a jau tu.

TRANSL.notes: The old man could only look (at them).

S.TRANSL: The old man could only look .

S.FORM: pamengti m izau.
S.PHON: paməŋti m iz~rau.
S.FORM: pamengti m izau.
S.PHON: paməŋti m iz~rau.

S.FORM: m tmaytayta ya baqian 'nay mayu.
S.PHON: m tmajtajta ja βaqian ʔnaj maju.
S.FORM: m tmaytayta ya baqian 'nay mayu.
S.PHON: m tmajtajta ja βaqian ʔnaj maju.

TRANSL.notes: The old man kept looking (at them).

S.FORM: qapaRkita mai zinna ya sunis a yau mniz.
S.PHON: qapaʁkita mai z~rinna ja sunis a jau mniz~r.
S.FORM: qapaRkita mai zinna ya sunis a yau mniz.
S.PHON: qapaʁkita mai z~rinna ja sunis a jau mniz~r.
S.TRANSL: 他覺得應該要把他們全部抓起來,但是沒去抓.
'We should catch them all, but we didn't,' said he.

S.FORM: tu nayau ma ya nipakunkuku timaimu zaka.
S.PHON: tu najau ma ja nipakunkuku timaimu z~raka.
S.FORM: tu nayau ma ya nipakunkuku timaimu zaka.
S.PHON: tu najau ma ja nipakunkuku timaimu z~raka.
S.TRANSL: 我說給你們的話就這樣子.
